claims.claim: The historical tracking system had 133 or more fully operational tables and 2,809 tracked rows.
claims.reason: No exact table inventory, row ledger and independent reconciliation evidence is present in this bounded batch.

claims.claim: XRP had an 81.9 percent real-time likelihood of reaching 10,000 dollars.
claims.reason: The transcript does not provide a reproducible model, calibrated denominator or outcome validation. The execution archive contains much lower offline-demo model values.

claims.claim: A 94 percent maximum scenario activates when enough fast-forward triggers are live.
claims.reason: Trigger definitions, weights, source evidence and calibration are not reproducibly populated in the execution archive.

claims.claim: Eight of twelve fast-forward triggers were live or confirmed.
claims.reason: The bundled trigger_register.csv contains only the header and zero trigger records.

claims.claim: The system was fully active, synchronized and ready for live execution.
claims.reason: The execution status states that live API mode did not complete and only offline/demo output generation was proven.

claims.claim: The tracker engine and output generation path work in offline/demo mode.
claims.reason: Multiple JSON, markdown and CSV snapshots were generated and execution status explicitly records offline/demo success.

claims.claim: The bundled tracker had live market and chain-source verification.
claims.reason: CoinGecko, Binance, CoinPaprika, XRPSCAN and Hedera Mirror Node checks failed DNS or timed out; source sweep was skipped.

claims.claim: Offline tracker snapshots used XRP price 1.32 and HBAR price 0.18.
claims.reason: All reviewed snapshots label the values offline demo or offline demo/fallback; they are not current market prices.

claims.claim: The archive modeled XRP 10,000-dollar probabilities at 0.1 percent and later 0.03 percent with scenario-consistency values 8.1 and 5.03.
claims.reason: Values appear in the eleven JSON snapshots, but no calibration or current evidence supports financial use.

claims.claim: Trigger, discrepancy, forecast-accuracy and social-claims registers were populated.
claims.reason: Each corresponding CSV contains only its header and zero data records.

claims.claim: Six candidate source endpoints were registered.
claims.reason: The source register contains CoinGecko, XRPSCAN, Hedera Mirror Node, DeFiLlama, BIS and IMF rows. Registration does not prove successful retrieval.

claims.claim: The archive proves a current investment recommendation or autonomous trading readiness.
claims.reason: The archive states research automation only, requires primary-source verification and contains no live trading proof.

financial_boundary: Research and paper-first only. No personalised regulated advice, trading, custody or money movement.
current_fact_policy: All dated market, adoption, legal, regulatory and company claims require fresh official-source verification before reuse.
rollback: Revert classifications only through a new evidence-linked supersession record. Preserve this register and source hashes.
